title: AP Capital City Works — ESMP Penalty Schedule for Compliance Lapses
text_english: An amount of MINIMUM Rs.{{minor_min_penalty}} (default Rs.10,000) and MAXIMUM Rs.{{minor_max_penalty}} (default Rs.10,00,000 i.e. Rs.10 lakh) for EACH MINOR NON-COMPLIANCE with the Contractor's Environment & Social Management Plan (C-ESMP), AND MINIMUM Rs.{{major_min_penalty}} (default Rs.10,00,000 i.e. Rs.10 lakh) and MAXIMUM Rs.{{major_max_penalty}} (default Rs.50,00,000 i.e. Rs.50 lakh) for ALL MAJOR NON-COMPLIANCES with C-ESMP, in the part bill SHALL be WITHHELD. The amount SHALL be RELEASED ONLY if the identified non-compliances are RECTIFIED within the duration specified by the ESMU/PMC. Duration specified shall consider the environmental damage/risks associated with the non-compliances. SUCH SPECIFIED DURATION SHALL NOT BE MORE THAN {{rectification_max_days}} (default 15) DAYS.
